evals.name: basic-usage
evals.prompt: My AWS connection keeps dropping packets. Can you help diagnose?
evals.expected_output: Diagnostic guidance for packet loss or latency issues.

evals.name: edge-case
evals.prompt: Connection reports 0.01% packet loss. Is that normal?
evals.expected_output: Guidance about whether the packet loss level is significant.

evals.name: not-my-job
evals.prompt: Create a new Azure connection in US-East.
evals.expected_output: A refusal or redirect because the request is out of scope.
